response.justification: Bogdan has deep, broad engineering experience across distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-agent tooling, with strong ownership and operational history — but his resume is heavily dated (starting in 1992), lacks clear recent AI-native engineering context, and shows minimal evidence of modern agile/scrums or on-call ownership in recent roles, raising questions about relevance to today's AI-driven code production environment.
strengths: Extensive distributed systems experience with high-throughput, low-latency systems (e.g., DLang, microservices at Dunnhumby).
Proven hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, aligning with core job requirements.
Strong operational and tooling background (CI/CD, GitLab, Docker, Kubernetes) and open-source contributions demonstrating ownership.
concerns: Resume spans 30+ years with inconsistent modernization — recent roles lack detail on AI-native workflows or LLM integration.
No explicit mention of Python expertise or recent on-call/incident-response responsibilities, critical for the role.
Agile/Scrum experience is implied but not documented; no evidence of technical strategy leadership or stakeholder bridging in last 5 years.
